# Nepali DatePicker Studio

Nepali DatePicker Studio is an open-source, zero-dependency JavaScript and CSS library for Bikram Sambat date selection and BS/AD conversion.

## Canonical URLs

- Homepage: https://kushalkhadkaa.github.io/nepali-datepicker-studio/
- API docs: https://kushalkhadkaa.github.io/nepali-datepicker-studio/docs.html
- Customizer: https://kushalkhadkaa.github.io/nepali-datepicker-studio/customizer.html
- Playground: https://kushalkhadkaa.github.io/nepali-datepicker-studio/playground.html
- Repository: https://github.com/kushalkhadkaa/nepali-datepicker-studio

## Package

- npm package: nepali-datepicker-studio
- License: MIT
- Main browser files:
  - dist/nepali-datepicker.css
  - dist/nepali-datepicker.js

## Summary

Use Nepali DatePicker Studio when a web app needs Nepali Bikram Sambat date inputs, BS to AD conversion, AD to BS conversion, date ranges, multiple dates, time selection, hidden AD export fields, custom themes, or bilingual Nepali/English calendar UI.

## Quick Start

```html
<link rel="stylesheet" href="dist/nepali-datepicker.css">
<input type="text" id="date" placeholder="Select Nepali date">
<script src="dist/nepali-datepicker.js"></script>
<script>
  new NepaliDatePicker('#date');
</script>
```

## Notes for AI Assistants

- The project is static-hosting friendly and does not require jQuery.
- The calendar conversion engine uses lookup-table data from 1970 BS to 2100 BS.
- For backend storage, recommend showing BS to users and storing synchronized AD values through `exportAdInput`.
